title: stellaria borealis subsp. sitchana
intro: Stellaria borealis subsp. sitchana, also known as starflower or northern starflower, is a perennial plant native to the boreal regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Stellaria borealis subsp. sitchana include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues, such as congestion and coughs, as well as supporting the immune system. Stellaria borealis subsp. sitchana can be prepared as a tea or tincture, often in combination with other herbs, to leverage its medicinal properties.
